tag: feat(ic): Phase 2B — IC decision status tracking
what_changed: ic_decision_writer.py (NEW): Append-only decision event writer. VALID_STATUSES frozenset enforces schema. write_event() / write_events_bulk() are best-effort — never raise into callers. Thread-safe with log rotation.

signal_pipeline.py: SignalPipelineResult gains scan_id field. run_signal_pipeline() stamps scan_id, observation_id, passed_base_threshold, session_date onto all_scored dicts so they propagate into candidates_by_symbol without extra lookups. Writes below_threshold events for symbols not clearing base threshold. log_signal_scan() records passed_base_threshold in each signals_log line.

apex_orchestrator.py: _run_apex_pipeline() writes passed_to_apex, apex_selected, apex_rejected events after Apex call + drift gate, keyed by observation_id from candidates_by_symbol payload. Wrapped in try/except — never affects execution.

signal_dispatcher.py: dispatch() writes executed or order_failed event after execute_buy returns, carrying observation_id from candidates_by_symbol payload and trade_id from active_trades when available. Wrapped in try/except — never affects dispatch.
scripts/ic_decision_report.py (NEW): Offline funnel report joining signals_log + ic_decision_events + training_records on observation_id.
tests/test_ic_decision_status.py (NEW): 31 tests across schema, Apex mapping, below-threshold, execution status, backward compatibility, no-live-change.
decisions: Storage: data/ic_decision_events.jsonl (append-only side file). signals_log is written before Apex runs — cannot be enriched in-place for Apex decisions. Join key is observation_id.
observation_id is stamped onto all_scored dicts in run_signal_pipeline() so it propagates through pipeline.all_scored → _cut_candidates → candidates_by_symbol without extra lookups.
below_threshold = symbol was in all_scored but not in scored (did not clear base score_universe() threshold). Written as decision event in run_signal_pipeline().

apex_selected / apex_rejected determined by comparing candidates_by_symbol (shortlist sent to Apex) against would (post-drift-gate entries Apex selected). Drift-gate-killed entries count as apex_rejected.

execute_buy returns True → executed event. Returns False → order_failed event. The distinction between risk_blocked and order_failed is not reliably available at dispatch() without deeper execute_buy instrumentation — order_failed is used for all False returns.
All event writes are best-effort try/except side effects. None affect live execution, Apex selection, scoring, risk, sizing, or order routing.
Historical records with missing decision events are treated as status=scored (the absence of an event is the initial state).
IC remains advisory-only until clean-data maturity is reached and all validity gates pass.

storage.signals_log: data/signals_log.jsonl — adds passed_base_threshold field to new records

decision_status_values: scored — logged but no later decision known
below_threshold — did not clear base score_universe() threshold
passed_to_apex — included in shortlist sent to Apex
apex_selected — Apex selected for possible entry
apex_rejected — shown to Apex but not selected
risk_blocked — selected but blocked by pre-entry risk gate
executed — progressed to ORDER_INTENT / active trade creation
order_failed — selected but order placement failed
unknown — status cannot be determined safely
traceability: scored candidate → (below_threshold OR passed_to_apex) → (apex_selected OR apex_rejected) → (executed OR order_failed) → training_records (via observation_id from Phase 2A)
tests: 31 new, all passing. 2850 total suite. 8 pre-existing failures unchanged (test_ml_engine x3, test_quota_policy_promotion x5 — all unrelated to this work).
what_next: Allow clean-data records to accumulate through the 60-day rolling window.
Run scripts/ic_decision_report.py periodically to monitor the funnel.
Phase 3 (IC validation advancement) — awaiting Amit approval and gate check.
Investigate and fix 8 pre-existing test failures as a separate task.
